scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Require: sdp-anat Supported: 100rel, histinfo, join, replaces, sdp-anat, timer Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1486167596 1 IN IP4 192.168.1.85 s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.3.178 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=group:ANAT 1 2 a=group:ANAT 4 m=audio 5004 RTP/AVP 0 9 110 8 18 120 c=IN IP4 192.168.3.178 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:110 G726-32/8000 a=fmtp:110 bitrate=32000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:30 a=mid:4 m=video 5006 RTP/AVP 109 34 c=IN IP6 :: a=inactive a=rtpmap:109 H264/90000 a=fmtp:109 profile-level-id=42e01f;max-br=429496729;max-cpb=306782 a=fmtp:34 CIF=1 a=mid:1 m=video 5006 RTP/AVP 109 34 c=IN IP4 0.0.0.0 a=inactive a=rtpmap:109 H264/90000 a=fmtp:109 profile-level-id=42e01f;max-br=429496729;max-cpb=306782 a=fmtp:34 CIF=1 a=mid:2

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Content-Length: 0
